Yadav2021-style adapted baseline using estimated 3D skeletons, 51 skeleton features plus 14 guided features. Video-level majority voting is threshold-free and is the main Yadav result if it has the best test macro-F1.
Chen2020-style adapted baseline: YOLOv8-Pose replaces OpenPose; fall is detected by hip-descent velocity, body angle, and width/height ratio.
